form.formComment: Latest effort finished last in a Grade 5 on March 25 over 330m at Temora behind Orson Jimmy beaten 5.5 lengths (19.48). Strong form emerging from the that last run. Leading chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished last in a Grade 5 on March 25 over 330m at Temora behind Orson Jimmy beaten 5.5 lengths (19.48). Strong form emerging from the that last run. Leading chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Galloped on the home turn and fell.

form.formComment: At the last start finished last over 457m at Temora beaten 9 lengths (26.76) behind Wild Angela in a Grade 5 on April 8. Solid chance with even luck.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: At the last start finished last over 457m at Temora beaten 9 lengths (26.76) behind Wild Angela in a Grade 5 on April 8. Solid chance with even luck.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings at final run of last campaign, finishing fourth (17.82) at Richmond Straight before going for a three-and-a-half months spell. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fifth last time out over 440m at this track. Other runners look much more appealing.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished last on February 23 over 400m at Maitland behind Spencer Banner beaten 6 lengths (22.83) in a Grade 5. Leading chance who should prove hard to beat.

formComments.comment: Latest effort finished last on February 23 over 400m at Maitland behind Spencer Banner beaten 6 lengths (22.83) in a Grade 5. Leading chance who should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 350m at this track. Will not find this easy. Not keen.

form.formComment: Hasn't produced too much recently, and faces tougher opposition here. Hard to have. Others look better.

form.formComment: Most recently finished 5th in a Grade 5 on April 8 over 330m at Temora behind Dana Mac beaten 10 lengths (19.77). Solid claims this line-up.
